commit.message:
Add arXiv 2607.10768 citation to README and CITATION.cff

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,18 +1,53 @@
 cff-version: 1.2.0
-title: Opti-Agent-Bench
+title: "Opti-Agent-Bench: Benchmarking End-to-End Optimization R&D Agents on Real-World Business Problems"
 message: If you use this benchmark, please cite the arXiv paper.
 type: software
 authors:
-  - name: Opti-Agent-Bench Authors
+  - family-names: Fu
+    given-names: Yongchang
+  - family-names: Huang
+    given-names: Xinjie
+  - family-names: Dai
+    given-names: Chengjun
+  - family-names: Feng
+    given-names: Chengzhe
+  - family-names: Zhang
+    given-names: Junshao
+  - family-names: Zhu
+    given-names: Hong
 abstract: >-
   A benchmark for evaluating end-to-end optimization R&D agents
   (formulation, implementation, execution, report) under the ORAC checklist.
 license: Apache-2.0
-repository-code: https://github.com/TODO/Opti-Agent-Bench
-url: https://arxiv.org/abs/TODO
+repository-code: https://github.com/huiliyi-XJ/Opti-Agent-Bench
+url: https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10768
+identifiers:
+  - type: url
+    value: https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10768
+    description: arXiv preprint
 keywords:
   - optimization
   - LLM
   - benchmark
   - operations-research
   - agents
+preferred-citation:
+  type: article
+  authors:
+    - family-names: Fu
+      given-names: Yongchang
+    - family-names: Huang
+      given-names: Xinjie
+    - family-names: Dai
+      given-names: Chengjun
+    - family-names: Feng
+      given-names: Chengzhe
+    - family-names: Zhang
+      given-names: Junshao
+    - family-names: Zhu
+      given-names: Hong
+  title: "Opti-Agent-Bench: Benchmarking End-to-End Optimization R&D Agents on Real-World Business Problems"
+  year: 2026
+  journal: arXiv
+  doi: 10.48550/arXiv.2607.10768
+  url: https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10768

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ Benchmark for evaluating LLM / R&D-agent **end-to-end optimization** ability:
 
 Evaluated with the **ORAC** checklist (formulation validity + solution validity), not objective value alone.
 
-Paper (arXiv): **TODO — fill URL**
+Paper (arXiv): [https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10768](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10768)

 }
